mapper.select: SELECT created_by AS username, COUNT(*) AS ruleCount, COALESCE(SUM(ARRAY_LENGTH(supported_by, 1)), 0) AS totalSupports, COALESCE(SUM(ARRAY_LENGTH(contested_by, 1)), 0) AS totalContests, COUNT(DISTINCT project_id) AS projectCount FROM rule WHERE deleted IS NULL GROUP BY created_by ORDER BY ruleCount DESC, totalSupports DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT created_by AS username, COUNT(*) AS ruleCount, COALESCE(SUM(ARRAY_LENGTH(supported_by, 1)), 0) AS totalSupports, COALESCE(SUM(ARRAY_LENGTH(contested_by, 1)), 0) AS totalContests, COUNT(DISTINCT project_id) AS projectCount FROM rule WHERE deleted IS NULL GROUP BY created_by ORDER BY totalSupports DESC, ruleCount DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT p.id AS projectId, p.name AS projectName, p.description AS projectDescription, p.created_by AS createdBy, COUNT(r.id) AS ruleCount, COALESCE(SUM(ARRAY_LENGTH(r.supported_by, 1)), 0) AS totalSupports, COALESCE(SUM(ARRAY_LENGTH(r.contested_by, 1)), 0) AS totalContests, ARRAY_LENGTH(p.members, 1) AS memberCount FROM project p LEFT JOIN rule r ON r.project_id = p.id AND r.deleted IS NULL WHERE p.deleted IS NULL GROUP BY p.id, p.name, p.description, p.created_by, p.members ORDER BY ruleCount DESC, totalSupports DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT p.id AS projectId, p.name AS projectName, p.description AS projectDescription, p.created_by AS createdBy, COUNT(r.id) AS ruleCount, COALESCE(SUM(ARRAY_LENGTH(r.supported_by, 1)), 0) AS totalSupports, COALESCE(SUM(ARRAY_LENGTH(r.contested_by, 1)), 0) AS totalContests, ARRAY_LENGTH(p.members, 1) AS memberCount FROM project p LEFT JOIN rule r ON r.project_id = p.id AND r.deleted IS NULL WHERE p.deleted IS NULL GROUP BY p.id, p.name, p.description, p.created_by, p.members ORDER BY totalSupports DESC, ruleCount DESC LIMIT #{limit}
